rawLog.rawText: Queer club night with chaotic, high-BPM sets packed with sexy, raw and unpredictable bangers. NOT ONLY BY FAGS NOT ONLY FOR FAGS! ♡ | Push It | Groovy dance night by residents Pushin Wood Soundsystem. With various guest DJs and live music in the night!
